ddls:
CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the survey started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the survey ended */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the survey (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "survey_type" TEXT /* Type of survey (e.g., employee satisfaction, manager effectiveness) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience of the survey (e.g., all employees, managers only) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., multiple choice, open-ended) */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the question in the survey */,
  "scale_type" TEXT /* Type of scale used for the question (e.g., Likert, numerical) */,
  "scale_min_value" INTEGER /* Minimum value of the scale */,
  "scale_max_value" INTEGER /* Maximum value of the scale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response option */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the option belongs to */,
  "option_text" TEXT /* Text of the response option */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the response option */,
  "option_value" INTEGER /* Value of the response option (e.g., 1-5 for a Likert scale) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_options_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the employee */,
  "job_level" TEXT /* Job level of the employee (e.g., entry-level, manager) */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who responded */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  "response_option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the selected response option (for multiple-choice questions) */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the response (for open-ended questions) */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was submitted */,
  "response_score" INTEGER /* Score of the response (e.g., 1-5 for a Likert scale) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_response_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_option_id") REFERENCES response_options ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "response_counts" (
  "response_count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response count */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  "response_option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response option */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of times the option was selected */,
  "percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of respondents who selected the option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_counts_response_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_option_id") REFERENCES response_options ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_response_counts_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "years_of_service" INTEGER /* Years of service at the company */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the employee */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the employee */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Disability status of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the role (e.g., admin, read-only) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the employee accessed the survey */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the access expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback or suggestion */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_category" TEXT /* Category of the feedback (e.g., suggestion, complaint) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., edit, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_history_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "escalations" (
  "escalation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each escalation */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "escalation_text" TEXT /* Text of the escalation or concern */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the escalation was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the escalation (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("escalation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_escalations_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_escalations_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "follow_ups" (
  "follow_up_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow-up */,
  "escalation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the escalation */,
  "follow_up_text" TEXT /* Text of the follow-up action or resolution */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date the follow-up was initiated */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was resolved */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the resolution (e.g., resolved, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_up_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_follow_ups_escalation_id FOREIGN KEY ("escalation_id") REFERENCES escalations ("escalation_id")
)
